title: geum japonicum f. iyoanum
intro: Geum japonicum f. iyoanum, also known as Japanese Avens, is a perennial plant species native to East Asia, belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Geum japonicum f. iyoanum typically involve infusions or decoctions of the roots and leaves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
